All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

G

gaAsiakasmäärä - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Counters for the number of customers that have arrived during the simulation, used to stop the simulation when the desired number of customers has arrived.
gaCloakroom - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Variable that records the amount of workers in GA-Cloakroom.
gaCloakroomField - Variable in class controller.MenuController
TextField that takes the value for the amount of workers in GA-Cloakroom.
gaCloakroomQueue - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Queues for the different service points and the arrival queue.
gaCustomerField - Variable in class controller.MenuController
TextField that takes the value for the amount of GA-Customers.
gaCustomers - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Variable that records the amount of GA-Customers.
gaKävijämäärä - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Counters for the number of customers that have arrived during the simulation, used to stop the simulation when the desired number of customers has arrived.
gaNarikka - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Service points for the different services in the simulation, each service point has a certain number of employees that can serve customers.
gaSecurity - Variable in class controller.MenuController
Variable that records the amount of workers in GA-Security.
gaSecurity - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Service points for the different services in the simulation, each service point has a certain number of employees that can serve customers.
gaSecurityField - Variable in class controller.MenuController
TextField that takes the value for the amount of workers in GA-Security.
gaSecurityQueue - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Queues for the different service points and the arrival queue.
getCloakroomTime() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Gets a Customer-instance's cloakroomTime-value if the Customer-instance will visit the cloakroom and returns 0 if the Customer-instance will not visit the cloakroom.
getCurrentTime() - Method in class simulation.Clock
 
getCustomer() - Method in class simulation.Event
Gets a Customer-instance and returns it.
getCustomers() - Static method in class view.SimGUI
 
getId() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Gets a Customer-instance's id number and returns it.
getInstance() - Static method in class simulation.Clock
 
getLippu() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Gets a Customer-instance's lippu-value and returns "VIP" if the lippu-value is true and "GA" if the lippu-value is false.
getMerchTime() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Gets a Customer-instance's merchTime-value if the Customer-instance will visit the merch store and returns 0 if the Customer-instance will not visit the merch store.
getPääsiSaliin() - Static method in class simulation.Customer
Gets the current amount of people in the performance-room and returns it.
getPosition() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Sets a Customer-instance's y-value based on it's VIP-status.
getQueuePosition() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Gets a Customer-instance's current queuePosition-value and returns it.
getSecurityTime() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Gets a Customer-instance's securityTime-value and returns it.
getServiceAnalysis() - Static method in class simulation.Database
Retrieves and prints the average times for security, cloakroom, and merch services from the database.
getTavaraMäärä() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Checks a Customer-instance's tavaraMaara-value and returns it.
getTime() - Method in class simulation.Event
Gets a double value and returns it.
getType() - Method in class simulation.Event
Gets an EventType value and returns it.
getX() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Gets a Customer-instance's current x-position and returns it.
getY() - Method in class simulation.Customer
Gets a Customer-instance's current y-position and returns it.
